---
title: "LLM Agents and Strategic Interaction"
short-title: "LLM Agents"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Recent work on language model game-playing, with epistemic caveats about a fast-moving field."
keywords: ["LLM", "language model", "agents", "strategic interaction", "AI"]
---

# LLM Agents and Strategy {#sec-llm-agents}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
